---
title: ""
---

::: {.section-card .contact-links}

# Let’s Connect

I’m always happy to connect about data science, analytics, research, finance, or collaboration opportunities.

<p><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> <a href="mailto:chanvictoriavivian@gmail.com">chanvictoriavivian@gmail.com</a></p>

<p><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/victoria-vivian-chan/" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a></p>

<p><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-person"></i> <a href="resume.pdf" target="_blank">Resume</a></p>

:::
